details.place_name: The Giddy Goat Coffee Roasters Dowd YMCA

raw_data.name: The Giddy Goat Coffee Roasters Dowd YMCA
raw_data.name_for_emails: The Giddy Goat Coffee Roasters Dowd Ymca
raw_data.owner_title: The Giddy Goat Coffee Roasters Dowd YMCA
raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Breakfast restaurant, Coffee roastery, Coffee wholesaler, Restaurant

reviews_data.review_text: Great people, great vibes, high quality, and quick!

Sorry I don’t get it, I’ve never had anything excellent here as far as coffee or tea. It’s very basic. I’ve ordered the matcha latte twice now and it’s been terrible. Pricing is too high for what it is in my opinion. Location and staff are great though.
The Baristas at Giddy Goat at Dowd Ymca know my name and are really friendly!!!
The customer service was not the best on this particular day which it usually is, so that was saddening. But overall, the food and chai tea is always great!
The Staff is Great and Always remember my order! So happy to have them apart of the YMCA!
I like everything about this beautiful and delicious place.
Always friendly and attentive!
Friendly staff 😃
Coffee is perfect! Iced and hot! I love that they have skim milk option too!
Customer service is always excellent, matched by the Giddy Gains smoothie!

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking, Paid parking garage

reviews_data.review_text: Super convenient, kind staff, great coffee, absurdly good empanadas!
Love the experience!
Best chai latte I’ve ever had!
Great coffee and good. Reasonable prices and happy staff. Love the new area at the Dowd!
You all have such great customer service and always so friendly and helpful.Keep the great work 🙂
The carrot cake is delicious!  Always friendly and accommodating service.
Love the refresh/ update to the space and offering food. Spinanch empanadas are the greateast.
Best coffee around!

My empanadas were SO good. Big, and warm, and toasted to perfection. The sauces were delicious too. I’m a regular at the Plaza Midwood location, and I love the consistency at the Dowd location. Nice work, GG!
Excellent European cappucino! Knowledgeable and helpful staff. Beautiful new digs- welcome to the Dowd!
Leigha made me the most incredible caramel latte I’ve ever had! Wow!  And, Evan’s service at the counter was so kind and professional. This coffee shop is the number 1 spot in town. Do not miss it!!

I absolutely love this place. I come here almost every single day to finish my school homework and do my work. The atmosphere is so peaceful and the coffee is absolutely delicious. They have a very good tea and we can’t forget the unlimited sparkling water.
